title: Suffolk: Local government reorganisation
body: "Timeline  5 February 2025  The invitation letter sent to Suffolk councils set out their milestones for reorganisation.  They were invited to submit final proposals by 26 September 2025.  19 November 2025  A written ministerial statement was made to Parliament. This set out that a consultation on local government reorganisation in Suffolk was launched.  ​For the purposes of the consultation, the proposals in Norfolk and Suffolk have been grouped together.  On the same day, the Minister of State for Local Government and Homelessness, Alison McGovern MP, wrote to the leaders of councils in Suffolk to thank them for their proposals and to inform them of the consultation. "
